title: Enhanced Default
description: The unOfficial enhanced default look and feel of Minecraft.
body:
# Minecraft unOfficial Enhanced Default Resource Pack
This resource pack enhances the feel of Minecraft. It is a part of the [Minecraft unOfficial Proyect](https://modrinth.com/collection/hB55ZXtF).

By the combination of different packs, we (I) bring the unOfficial enhanced default pack. With the most subtle (yet fundamental) additions and changes, this pack doesn't intent to transform Minecraft, just enhanced it with all the following features:

# List of Features
## Additions:
* Bushy Leaves, three different variants
* Heavy Core 3D model when holding by a player
* Petrified Oak Slab unique texture
* Enhanced Golden Apple unique texture
* Debug Stick unique texture
* Block/Slab different texture \
 ↳ All Polished Blocks (except Blackstone Bricks) \
 ↳ All Cut and normal Sandstone variants \
 ↳ Prismarine Bricks \
 ↳ Quartz Block
* Every Bed flat texture
## Changes:
* Complete GUI overhaul
* Paper, Map & Filled Map re-texture, combining the pre1.14 with the actual one for the perfect silhouette
* Structure Void re-textured, to align with the Operator Items style
* Tipped Arrow re-textured, to be more realistic and less obstructive.
* Every Piston arm model enhanced, making it similar to bedrock
* Re-textured, to make things more Blocky \
 ↳ Block & Ice breaking animation \
 ↳ Rail Corner \
 ↳ Entity Shadow
* Re-textured, to make things more JAPPAfied \
 ↳ Every Disc
 ↳ Moon phases
* Heart and Damage particle re-texture
